steps.title: Identify the angle configuration from the figure
steps.content: Three lines intersect at point P. From the figure, the three labeled angles $x^{\circ}$, $y^{\circ}$, and $z^{\circ}$ lie on the same side of one of the lines, so together they span a straight angle along that line.

steps.title: Apply the straight angle property
steps.content:
Angles forming a straight line sum to $180^{\circ}$:
$$x^{\circ} + y^{\circ} + z^{\circ} = 180^{\circ}$$
Substituting $x = 65$ and $y = 75$:
$$65 + 75 + z = 180$$
$$140 + z = 180$$
$$z = 40$$
That matches Choice C — 40.
